raw_notes: ENF Solar profile: https://www.enfsolar.com/sunami-solar. Malindi Highway P.O. Box: 10200-80101 Shanzu, Mombasa. Vision: bringing electricity to every home in rural East Africa.
description: Established 2017 in Mombasa. Offers medium-capacity solar home systems and off-grid productive use appliances for rural off-grid communities in East Africa. PAYGO mobile payment model for micro businesses and households.

raw_notes: ENF Solar profile: https://es.enfsolar.com/elmec-systems-kenya. Old Mutual Building, 2nd Floor, Suite 219E, Kimathi Street, Nairobi.
description: Appliances, electrical and electronics manufacturing and solar system installer based in Nairobi. Located on Kimathi Street.

company_name: Center for Alternative Technologies Kenya Ltd.
raw_notes: ENF Solar profile: https://www.enfsolar.com/cat. Solar component seller and installer.
description: Founded 2006 in Nairobi. Leading provider of renewable energy solutions in East and Central Africa (Kenya, Tanzania, Sudan, Somalia). Distributor of solar products including deep cycle batteries, inverters, solar water pumping, solar fridges, lithium batteries, and remote lodge power systems. Located at Abacus Lane, Baba Dogo Road, Ruaraka Industrial Area.

raw_notes: ENF Solar profile: https://www.enfsolar.com/gd-solar-2. Solar component seller and installer. Portfolio of residential and commercial installations across Kenya.
description: Solar electric power generation company based in Nairobi. 2nd Floor Rubis House, Thindigua, Kiambu Road. Residential and commercial solar installations across Kenya.

raw_notes: ENF Solar profile: https://www.enfsolar.com/keru-solar. Solar component seller and installer.
description: Clean-tech company based in Kenya accelerating the transition to clean energy with a strong focus on solar solutions. Matches projects with the right combination of inverters and batteries for performance, resilience, and long-term value.

raw_notes: ENF Solar profile: https://www.enfsolar.com/critical-power. Solar component seller and installer.
description: Leading provider of power products and alternative power solutions in East Africa. Operating since 2003 with presence in Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Nigeria, and South Africa. Product range includes UPS systems, solar panels (Felicity Solar), AVRs, voltage protectors, solar water heating, solar fridges, inverters, batteries, generators, air conditioning, forklifts, telecom equipment, and electrical cables. Located in Westlands, Parklands/Highridge area, Nairobi.

Fully registered and EPRA-licensed solar energy company. One-stop platform for complete solar solutions including solar panels, inverters, battery storage, and solar water heating systems for homes, businesses, and industries. Notable projects include 140kWp + 266kWh installation in Masai Mara. Exhibited at Solar Africa 2025. Located at Yasian Interior Centre, Nairobi.

Affiliate of the Glosec Group and Achelis Group, operating in East Africa. Provides solutions for residential and commercial premises focusing on Energy & Water, Mechanical & Electrical, and Security, Safety & Control systems. Services include solar panels, solar water heating, generators, water treatment & desalination, air conditioning, fire detection & suppression, and building management systems. Located at Avellino Court, Lower Kabete Road, Nairobi.

Fully registered and licensed company based in Nairobi providing end-to-end energy and electrical solutions. Services span electrical installations, solar power systems, lighting, and security solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial clients. Located on Duruma Road, City Square, Nairobi.
